item.title: Intriguing
item.dc:creator: huntsnhava40

item.title: So long and thanks for all the fish
item.description: Hi Imgur. I’m benedictcucumberpatch’s best friend. We’ve known each other since primary school, and she’s asked me to do a quick post to let you all know how she’s doing. Before I get to that, I’ve seen a post or two flying around with links to the American Bladder Association or something similar. Just to make it known publicly, this isn’t something my gorgeous friend has ever requested anyone donate to, and she was a firm believer in the notion of effective altruism - i.e. donating to a charity where your money or time will have the most impact it can. She mainly liked to find small local charities or individuals, where she could really make a difference, and that’s what I’d encourage you to do now. Without further ado: “Well, that’s it then. The final curtain. I’ve given up the ghost. Kicked the bucket. Breathed my last. Gone to meet my Maker to file a complaint. What a joy and a privilege it’s been. I don’t intend to pontificate on all I’ve seen and done and learnt, and I’ll try to keep this short and sweet. You can all rest assured, I’ve done enough. I want to say a huge thank you to this wonderful community. You probably know by now that @MartynMage has declared me a legend, and who am I to dispute that? To each and everyone one of you who took the time to reach out, know that you brought me so much happiness. I’m hoping to guilt trip my wonderful friend into keeping this account open, so the messages can be read into the wind, and a piece of me kept alive through him. I wonder if I should use this time to ramble about how all countries should have universal healthcare and assisted dying. I think y’all have probably heard enough of that from me though. So, what can I say? Love each other, be honest and kind, and cherish the living fuck out of those that matter to you. You don’t always get to choose when the grim reaper comes for you, but you can choose how you interact with the world today.” God, I love her. I will, with Imgur’s permission, keep this account open and read through each and every one of your messages. I’ve also been charged with keeping Dobby on the road, if I can. I might choose to post some of the places we visit together, or I might not. Grief can be unpredictable at times. All that remains to say is rest easy, my friend.
item.dc:creator: benedictcucumberpatch

item.title: Probably released on a Monday? Every day is a good day for it though.
item.description:
It's true. I asked myself. That's 100% of my sample population. (I've got enough comments about this particular post that I feel the need to remind everyone it is in jest, as very few scientists feel comfortable saying things like "all", "always", and "never", especially in social sciences where the truth is that behavioral patterns will probably never be 100% true across the population....so don't take it seriously. Just chuckle and move the fuck on lol) Welcome to whatever day it is. It is now hump day. Fight me. As always there is no OC here, just curios that get a rise out of me.
2
3
4. Summer fashion.
5
6
7
8
9. It's all fun and games till they want to break out a kiddie pool and latex gloves!
10
11
12
13. Dirty nacelles ....
14
15
16
17. If it was a porn tentacle fest it would win record downloads.
18

29. This goes both ways! Ladies get the oral you deserve!

45. This may be a repeat offender.

49
50. Thanks for coming! As always. Be kind to each other in the comments! This is a good place to make friends if you're interests align, because nobody told us that skill only gets harder as we age. Oof. MV Edit. Always fun to make most viral. For those that are interested, here's links to other similar stuff! 32: https://imgur.com/gallery/rhO6qwP 31: https://imgur.com/gallery/Bc27bEJ 30: https://imgur.com/gallery/3ar1Zgu 29: https://imgur.com/gallery/K5zEezV 28: https://imgur.com/gallery/qhifSb1 27: https://imgur.com/gallery/rWDJlZl 26: https://imgur.com/gallery/vui62Hf 25: https://imgur.com/gallery/6Xa9v4t 24: https://imgur.com/gallery/NPkZGWk 23: https://imgur.com/gallery/VGkwrdS 22: https://imgur.com/gallery/OsoKl7W 21: https://imgur.com/gallery/EXWbc1u 20 :https://imgur.com/gallery/5FvEFdm 19: https://imgur.com/gallery/q6juBR9 18: https://imgur.com/gallery/WXhygYp 17: https://imgur.com/gallery/KCVrSCL 16: https://imgur.com/gallery/6NrSsyV 15: https://imgur.com/gallery/1MKS6dK 14: https://imgur.com/gallery/g5oOjmB 13: https://imgur.com/gallery/6HguL7m 12: https://imgur.com/gallery/gXstg2w 10: https://imgur.com/gallery/H0EqBWM 9: https://imgur.com/gallery/8I2Q7l8 8: http://imgur.com/gallery/OHgyf1T 7: https://imgur.com/gallery/Rmvffx3 6: https://imgur.com/gallery/S1SxD7Z 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/ltPgUhK 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/uNLAR4T 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/tKhLPCt 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/0HmYMTH 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/RLfsBYw Spoiler: they are all mature

item.title: The 100th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
AFAB = Assigned Frog At Birth AMAB = Assigned Mushroom At Birth ACAB = Assigned Crab At Birth Arab = Assigned Rangoon At Birth (Captain) Ahab = Assigned Human At Birth
WOLOLOLO I've been playing AoE II since its original release and I never understood the meme. The monks have never said "Wolololo", it's just a loud, low-pitch "AAAAAAAAHHHHH" But I recently found out there's 2 or more different types of cars that the "How do you turn this on" cheat will give you, depending on what version you have or something. Apparently, there's the one I'm familiar with, that has a machine gun, and one that shoot rockets.
I'm literally early for 99.9999% of everything I go to
Castle
♪ Cuz I ain't no Holla Back squirrel! ♫
YIKE Red Flag much?
FUN FACT: Cheese was invented around 8000 BCE when someone decided they needed something delicious to eat.
foaf
Everyone knows neon baby pandas speak Dutch, not German.
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #AncientMemes #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 50 https://imgur.com/gallery/k67M01GVol Vol 51 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXUSEtU Vol 52 https://imgur.com/gallery/ySPYez7 Vol 53 https://imgur.com/gallery/LSplkEf Vol 54 https://imgur.com/gallery/sI6JnEV Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. V Vol 63 https://imgur.com/gallery/SZlkuUY - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. VI Vol 64 https://imgur.com/gallery/KBtYW2X - Obvious Plant (and the like) Vol 65 https://imgur.com/gallery/4tggfcY - BEEEEEEEEEESSSSS!!! Vol 66 https://imgur.com/gallery/sl4sRV7 Vol 67 https://imgur.com/gallery/DR4LbNI Vol 68 https://imgur.com/gallery/H4ipoO9 - D&Dump - Image Edition Vol 69 https://imgur.com/gallery/WhH54f2 - D&Dump - Reading Edition Vol 70 https://imgur.com/gallery/pAoobS6 Vol 71 https://imgur.com/gallery/zmZF53H Vol 72 https://imgur.com/gallery/StUTVA7 Vol 73 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZXblzC0 Vol 74 https://imgur.com/gallery/1rWvTNc Vol 75 https://imgur.com/gallery/EaMatw6 Vol 76 https://imgur.com/gallery/DB7XXis Vol 77 https://imgur.com/gallery/P76BUQW Vol 78 https://imgur.com/gallery/GpUx9JD Vol 79 https://imgur.com/gallery/KEfEp2k Vol 80 https://imgur.com/gallery/MMkm8Fq Vol 81 https://imgur.com/gallery/rFCfCH9 Vol 82 https://imgur.com/gallery/EFIGQGf Vol 83 https://imgur.com/gallery/2sJkh1h Vol 84 https://imgur.com/gallery/hunUWUD Vol 85 https://imgur.com/gallery/G96GtGQ Vol 86 https://imgur.com/gallery/ihADXqJ Vol 87 https://imgur.com/gallery/iTlb6z7 Vol 88 https://imgur.com/gallery/4XXmRVg Vol 89 https://imgur.com/gallery/cX2uRd2 - FROG EDITION v. I picked up two pregnant cats on Sunday. They’re best friends, and Pepa had her babies hours after I brought her home. This is Julietta hanging out with Pepa’s babies.
This is Pepa.
Julietta, you’ll have your own baby soon!

item.title: Or you could let them choose ....
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: Creative writing about losing 150 pounds in 9 months
item.description:
She was so sweet about it. Asking about someone’s health/body is fraught with pitfalls. I’m super open, but some people aren’t. Tread carefully. I 100% unintentionally wrote about weed on 4/20. It’s all the funnier to me now!
She called me out. I have a history of creative writing on Facebook groups for families who live and travel in their RVs. “What do you do for income?” is asked about daily- I started writing creative stories as to wild income streams.
She remembers the good ole days of the stories and didn’t see through my ruse.
But hey, weight loss surgery or not- it’s still hard work. I get that people will be negative (queue the down votes and snide comments) but it’s been most excellent for my wife and I.
I even went roller skating with my teenage daughter. She was shocked that I knew how, that I could actually skate, and even a bit disappointed I didn’t eat shit. Never would I have ever tried this at 350 pounds! Ask me anything re: my weight loss surgery journey. I’ll answer you straight- Imgur’s comment limit is too hard for creative writing.
item.dc:creator: learntorv

item.title: My Goth IHop cosplay!
item.description:
It was balsy of me to post some pictures of my face yesterday, so here are some cropped ones as well!
There's just something with this theme that I'm obsessed with
I had SO much fun getting all the merch, some created by me, some ordered from already existing designs!
Hope you enjoy the idea of a restaurant like this just as much as I do! If you wanna see the uncropped pics, you can find them here: https://imgur.com/gallery/wJyOBDq
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: been a ride

item.title: Death over Justice
item.description: Someone asked me to post about this again. So here I go. There’s only a week left. I don’t know if she’s innocent or not. I’m not sure it matters much to me. But either way I think it’s clear that they did not prove ‘beyond a reasonable doubt’ that she was guilty. I don’t think we should kill someone if there is even a shred of doubt. And in this case there is seemly more than a shred. The above article is of course from a non-profit trying to free Melissa. As such they are not without their biases. I understand that. Even then the evidence that our flawed justice system failed her is pretty staggering. Unfortunately you cannot appeal a case just on the ground that you think the conviction was wrong (ie: on the ground you are innocent) you must make the appeal about something else. For example Melissa tried to appeal her case in February of 2021 on the grounds that some of the defense key statements were stricken from the record as unreleased to the case when they shouldn’t have been. Unfortunately judges didn’t agree with this opinion and her appeal was rejected. It’s difficult to get an appeal in the first place and even harder to have it granted. You can read the appeal here (https://www.ca5.uscourts.gov/opinions/pub/16/16-70027-CV0.pdf) and learn more of why death sentence convictions are so hard to over turn here (https://youtu.be/kpYYdCzTpps) and here if you want a longer read (https://www.ncsc.org/__data/assets/pdf_file/0023/15188/why-so-long.pdf) Recent articles have spoken with some of the people who sentenced her. It’s interesting to hear what they have to say also. “She was not evil. She was just struggling. ... If we had heard passionately from the defense defending her in some way, we might have reached a different decision," one of the jurors wrote in an affidavit. I was also surprised to read the following in a report by NPR “In a letter last month to the Board of Pardons and Paroles and to Abbott, 83 Texas House members said executing Lucio would be "a miscarriage of justice." "As a conservative Republican myself, who has long been a supporter of the death penalty in the most heinous cases ... I have never seen a more troubling case than the case of Melissa Lucio," said state Rep. Jeff Leach, who signed the letter.“ Jeff Leach used to represent my district when I lived in Texas. I have never voted for him and I disagree with him on many things so I was fairly surprised to hear he was one of the ones who signed this letter. The DA at the time of her trial was also found guilty of bribery and extortion. While that doesn’t necessarily mean he messed with her case I think it’s only right that ever case he over took should be looked at. Especially those with a death sentence. If you live in Texas you can call Gov Abbot here 956-446-2866 and just bother him. Haha. Or you can ask that he grant a commutation or reprieve to Melissa Lucio and give her lawyers time to make her case. It’s late. I’m tired. So I will probably edit this tomorrow. If I find anymore interesting items I’ll try and add them here. Petition by the Innocent Project https://innocenceproject.org/petitions/stop-execution-of-innocent-melissa-lucio-texas/ Look at the letter representatives in Texas signed https://innocenceproject.org/bipartisan-texas-state-senators-join-state-representatives-in-urging-board-of-pardons-paroles-spare-melissa-lucio/ Report by Philip DeFranco https://youtu.be/Nq78C1rkLG8 Report by the Intercept https://theintercept.com/2022/04/17/melissa-lucio-clemency-execution/ Article by NPR https://www.npr.org/2022/04/03/1090491855/lawyers-hope-new-evidence-can-stop-texas-woman-melissa-lucios-execution
item.dc:creator: TheRedCat13
